audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. For DelayUntil* actions (lines 1599-1702), no P2pMessage::Ignore/Accept is sent to libp2p—gossip validation times out, implicitly treating as IGNORE (no forwarding). Messages are queued with origin preserved for later retry_data_column_sidecar (lines 1613, 1659, 1690). Explicit Ignore action (line 1588) sends P2pMessage::Ignore. All IGNORE cases prevent forwarding while enabling local reprocessing.
